summary: A material bypass remains for shortened hex IPv4-mapped IPv6 forms such as ::ffff:a00:1.

findings.invariant: private IPv4 mapped into IPv6 (10/8, 172.16/12, 192.168/16, 169.254/16, 127/8) is now blocked in BOTH notations.
findings.title: Shortened hex IPv4-mapped IPv6 addresses are decoded as the wrong IPv4 octets
findings.recommendation: Parse the hex form as two IPv6 hextets and left-pad each hextet to 4 digits before concatenating. For example, ::ffff:a00:1 must normalize to bytes 0a 00 00 01, not 00 00 a0 01; then apply isBlockedIpv4Octets to the resulting first two octets.
